name: Chicken-Style Noodle Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles as directed on package.
2. Drain the cooked noodles.
3. In a separate pot, sauté onion, celery, chicken-style seasoning, and salt in 1/4 cup water until tender.
4. Add 6 cups water with cubed potatoes to the pot. Continue cooking until the potatoes are tender.
5. Process the garbanzos in their own juice, adding a little water if necessary.
6. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
7. Simmer slowly for about 10 minutes to allow flavors to blend.
8. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as desired.
Total Calories: 2400
Posted by Lawrence Kellie Courtesy of Fred Peters.
